news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings' Rs 2,000-cr Chennai plant to start operations by H1FY24, supplying 40,000-50,000 wheels to Indian Railways.
JV with Titagarh Rail Systems targets 15.4 lakh wheels over 20 years; aims Rs 10,000-cr revenue by 2030 with 1mn tonnes metal processing.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings' Rs 2,000-cr Chennai plant to start operations by H1FY24, supplying 40,000-50,000 wheels to Indian Railways.
JV with Titagarh Rail Systems targets 15.4 lakh wheels over 20 years; aims Rs 10,000-cr revenue by 2030 with 1mn tonnes metal processing.

news.title:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: Jindal Stainless, Ramkrishna Forgings, NCC, Brigade Enterprises, and Federal Bank.
Nifty rose 1.16% to 24,050.60; Bank Nifty surged 1.99% to 55,912.75, showing bullish momentum.
news.summary:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: Jindal Stainless, Ramkrishna Forgings, NCC, Brigade Enterprises, and Federal Bank.
Nifty rose 1.16% to 24,050.60; Bank Nifty surged 1.99% to 55,912.75, showing bullish momentum.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings received Rs 51.18 crore as 25% upfront payment for share warrants.
Auditor certified compliance, confirming no fund circulation or book entry manipulation.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings received Rs 51.18 crore as 25% upfront payment for share warrants.
Auditor certified compliance, confirming no fund circulation or book entry manipulation.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings' stock rose 7.9% to ₹503.50 after launching a ₹249 crore DISA FLEX 80 casting line.
The new line produces 28,800 tonnes/year, marking its entry into automotive castings as a one-stop supplier.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings' stock rose 7.9% to ₹503.50 after launching a ₹249 crore DISA FLEX 80 casting line.
The new line produces 28,800 tonnes/year, marking its entry into automotive castings as a one-stop supplier.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd announces cessation of subsidiaries post NCLT Kolkata's approval of amalgamation scheme.
Scheme effective March 25, 2026; subsidiaries dissolved without winding up, appointed date January 01, 2024.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd announces cessation of subsidiaries post NCLT Kolkata's approval of amalgamation scheme.
Scheme effective March 25, 2026; subsidiaries dissolved without winding up, appointed date January 01, 2024.

news.title: RIDDHI Portfolio P Ltd bought 1,750,000 shares of Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd at an avg price of ₹495.
news.summary: RIDDHI Portfolio P Ltd bought 1,750,000 shares of Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd at an avg price of ₹495.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd witnessed a block deal worth Rs.86.63 crores.
The transaction involved one seller and one buyer.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd witnessed a block deal worth Rs.86.63 crores.
The transaction involved one seller and one buyer.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings saw an NSE block trade worth Rs 86.6 cr.
About 1.75 lakh shares traded at Rs 495 during the pre-open session.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings saw an NSE block trade worth Rs 86.6 cr.
About 1.75 lakh shares traded at Rs 495 during the pre-open session.

news.title:
Forging firms like Ramkrishna Forgings, MM Forgings face fuel supply disruptions, pressuring production timelines.
Firms warn of wider manufacturing risks, with rising fuel costs adding to margin pressures.
news.summary:
Forging firms like Ramkrishna Forgings, MM Forgings face fuel supply disruptions, pressuring production timelines.
Firms warn of wider manufacturing risks, with rising fuel costs adding to margin pressures.

news.title:
Eastern Credit transferred 2.26 Cr shares of Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd to Riddhi Portfolio under an NCLT-approved merger.
Naresh Jalan acquired 40,000 shares, raising promoter group holdings to 46.27% as per SEBI SAST disclosures.
news.summary:
Eastern Credit transferred 2.26 Cr shares of Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd to Riddhi Portfolio under an NCLT-approved merger.
Naresh Jalan acquired 40,000 shares, raising promoter group holdings to 46.27% as per SEBI SAST disclosures.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings starts commercial production of 8000 Ton press line, adding 40,000 Tonnes PA forging capacity.
Total forging capacity reaches 311,400 Tonnes PA with Rs. 80 Cr investment via debt and internal accruals.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings starts commercial production of 8000 Ton press line, adding 40,000 Tonnes PA forging capacity.
Total forging capacity reaches 311,400 Tonnes PA with Rs. 80 Cr investment via debt and internal accruals.

news.title:
NCLT Kolkata approved the amalgamation of Mal Metalliks, Multitech Auto with Ramkrishna Casting Solutions, subsidiaries of Ramkrishna Forgings.
The merger aims to streamline operations, optimize resources, enhance efficiency, and strengthen financial structure post-approval.
news.summary:
NCLT Kolkata approved the amalgamation of Mal Metalliks, Multitech Auto with Ramkrishna Casting Solutions, subsidiaries of Ramkrishna Forgings.
The merger aims to streamline operations, optimize resources, enhance efficiency, and strengthen financial structure post-approval.

news.title:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.
news.summary:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.

news.title:
US tariff relief could boost Indian engineering and auto exports, says Ramkrishna Forgings MD.
Bajaj Auto sees potential production shift to India with supportive tariff changes enhancing US exports.
news.summary:
US tariff relief could boost Indian engineering and auto exports, says Ramkrishna Forgings MD.
Bajaj Auto sees potential production shift to India with supportive tariff changes enhancing US exports.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings targets 10-15% annual sales growth through FY27 and beyond.
The firm plans to cut debt below INR 1,900 Cr by FY26, reducing INR 350 Cr in Q3.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings targets 10-15% annual sales growth through FY27 and beyond.
The firm plans to cut debt below INR 1,900 Cr by FY26, reducing INR 350 Cr in Q3.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings hosted its Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 27, 2026.
The audio link of the call is available on the company's website for investor access.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings hosted its Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 27, 2026.
The audio link of the call is available on the company's website for investor access.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings plans to boost growth with new aluminum forgings and facilities.
It includes a 45,000 MT castings plant, 40,000 MT forging capacity, and railway bogie assemblies by Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings plans to boost growth with new aluminum forgings and facilities.
It includes a 45,000 MT castings plant, 40,000 MT forging capacity, and railway bogie assemblies by Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.63B from ₹1.26B YoY, showing growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.9% from 11.8% YoY, highlighting profitability gains.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.63B from ₹1.26B YoY, showing growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.9% from 11.8% YoY, highlighting profitability gains.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings' new aluminium forging facility began production on 20 Jan 2026.
The Rs. 57.5 crore facility with 3,000-tonne capacity targets aluminium and EV markets.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings' new aluminium forging facility began production on 20 Jan 2026.
The Rs. 57.5 crore facility with 3,000-tonne capacity targets aluminium and EV markets.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd schedules a Board Meeting on 27 Jan 2026 to review Q3 & 9M FY 2025-26 financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-result declaration as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd schedules a Board Meeting on 27 Jan 2026 to review Q3 & 9M FY 2025-26 financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-result declaration as per SEBI norms.
